_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: mTORC1 signaling, as shown by the expression of phosphorylated S6...was increased in nasal and frontal bones from CKO mice...much stronger phosphorylated S6 staining in the osteoblasts
details: Successfully detected increased mTORC1 signaling through phosphorylated S6 expression in nasal and frontal bones from CKO mice, with stronger staining in osteoblasts
